name: news api

meta.description: Headlines by category/country, search any topic, filter by source, financial news

specs.name: get_crypto_news
specs.description: Get latest cryptocurrency news from top financial sources.

specs.name: get_financial_news
specs.description:
Get latest financial and market news for a specific topic.
query examples: 'AAPL stock', 'Bitcoin', 'Fed interest rates', 'oil prices', 'inflation'

specs.name: get_market_news
specs.description: Get latest stock market and financial markets news.

specs.name: get_news_by_source
specs.description:
Get news from a specific source.
source_id examples: reuters, bloomberg, cnbc, the-wall-street-journal,
financial-times, fortune, business-insider, techcrunch

specs.name: get_news_sources
specs.description:
Get all available news sources.
category: business, technology, science, health, sports, entertainment, general

specs.name: get_top_headlines
specs.description:
Get top news headlines by category and country.
category: business, technology, science, health, sports, entertainment, general
country: us, gb, ca, au, de, fr, jp, in, cn, br

specs.name: search_news
specs.description:
Search all news articles for any query.
query: e.g. 'Apple earnings', 'Bitcoin crash', 'Federal Reserve rates'
sort_by: publishedAt, relevancy, popularity
days_back: how many days back to search (1-30)
